creator: pierogmorski@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I've noticed the devel/git/Makefile doesn't link git-prompt.sh to /usr/local/etc/bash_completion.d.  Further, it links git-completion.bash to /usr/local/etc/bash_completion.d/git.sh.

# l /usr/local/etc/bash_completion.d/
total 35
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel      6 Sep 22 14:13 .
drwxr-xr-x  35 root  wheel     57 Sep 28 00:50 ..
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel  19809 Sep 12 18:33 _pkg.bash
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    559 Sep 12 18:38 dbus-bash-completion.sh
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel     59 Sep 19 18:46 git.sh -> ../../share/git-core/contrib/completion/git-completion.bash
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel   4603 Sep 12 18:47 tmux

This appears a non-standard approach.  Homebrew on OSX links them both using their original filenames, for example.  Could you please comment?  There's also the csh and zsh completion files, but those are outside my scope.

FreeBSD 11.2, git 2.19.

Thanks!
